Slot: CHEST
AC: 10
INT: +10
SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark

Rarity: Very Rare

NPC Name
the Crypt Keeper

Howling Stones (Charasis)


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Pretty looking, but not worth it anymore
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2005 at 11:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361471651
66 posts
I bought one of these in the baz the other day for 250 plat. Its not worth much anymore because of all the new robes out there. Figured I would pick it up so my chanter would look cool as well as have a chanter only robe. With all the player made robes out there that have cha bonuses on them, this robe doesn't see any more use. I only wear it when just walking around or giving out clarity. When I am actually hunting in a group, this gets stashed in the pack and out comes the Robe of Intellect (one of the best robes you can buy for a chanter in my opionion). This robe is worth it for the looks or if you cha is maxed out and aren't worried about that stat anymore.
▲ Page top
Is 500pp a good deal for this robe?
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2003 at 6:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255037618
231 posts
Is this robe worth 500pp. I got one for that much in the Bazaar on Xev and never seen one before. I'm just wondering if this is truly a rare item or not.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 26 2002 at 11:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I paid 220 plat for this robe. I found Loam Encrusted Lined shoes for 20 plat in the bazaar, which I sold for 500 plat. Then I sold the Incadescent Mask (a quest) for 1,000 plat. The trader wanted 2,000 for the robe, but accepted the 1,500 plat plus an Inlaid Jade Hoop,which I paid 200 plat for. One robe...220 plat.
#cordite, Posted: Jul 06 2002 at 12:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I wonder why this MOB, a necro, drops a robe that can only be worn by a enchanter .
Where

NORTH Wing, our chanter got one tonight

Edited, Mon Feb 25 21:43:44 2002
▲ Page top
Necro Class Mob,Dropping an Enchanter Only Robe....
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2001 at 2:44 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Lemmie get this straight,he uses the Parrying Dagger (If he has it) and its Ranger Only,but the mobs a Necro,He also Drops a Robe,which is only usable by Enchanters.......but hes a Necro,this is kind of lame...It wouldnt bother me if he at least dropped ONE Necro usable item,since he is one,but alas,NOTTA.....just seems like a bad call on Verant,maybe it's just a dumb opinion,but it just doesnt seem ton make since for him not to drop ANY Necro usable gear,but hes a necro and can hold an Enchanter Only Robe and Use a Ranger only Weapon,*thumbs up*
▲ Page top
RE: Necro Class Mob,Dropping an Enchanter Only Robe....
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2003 at 7:51 PM Rating: Decent
erakar
Scholar
55 posts
Look at it this way.....

Have you ever hunted somewhere and rolled for an item you couldnt use, only to try to sell it later??? Maybe this guy was on the way to the Bazaar to try and sell his wares when a party of adventures came up and kicked his *****
▲ Page top
RE: Necro Class Mob,Dropping an Enchanter Only Robe....
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2003 at 4:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759728929
View User Forum
80 posts
Its all over the game man. I killed Tolapumj in Seb not too long ago and got a monk only 2hb staff. Peacebringer if you want to look it up. Jumpy is a chanter froglok, and he's using a monk weapon not equippable by frogloks. lol Anyway, its all over the game is my point. Not a big deal. Oh, and since LoY crafted robes came out, this robe is crap unless you can get it for around 100 pp. I saw a robe with 8 int, 8 charisma, and some mana and hp's going for 100 plat the other day. Just my 2cp's, check out the bazaar or make your own.
▲ Page top
RE: Necro Class Mob,Dropping an Enchanter Only Robe....
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2004 at 9:41 PM Rating: Decent
Valdon
674 posts
(growling) it does not make this robe 'crap' it just means better it out there. This is way nice. I got mine for free as a gift. When it rains it pours. I had a crystal covered then only a bit later someone let me loot the robe of discord.... then someone handed me this. Also had the necro also usable one... the Thergamist or whatever... I have like 6 robes in my bank. I was just gonna say maybe the guy is a fasion risk, your really doing him a favor killing him and looting it?

· 'Soultree Vixen' Terris-Thule. Woodelf Ranger of 34th season.

# Mar 13 2002 at 2:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759018338
163 posts
Maybe he's sociable and had a chanter and ranger friend drop by to hang out. Possibly the ranger left in a hurry cause The Crypt Keeper and the chanter were getting friendly, while accidently leaving the weapon behind. Drusella Sathir finds out about the chanter and get jelous. She being a complete beatch the chanter feels she has got to leave quickly leaving her clothes behind. There ya go, explanation, happy now?

There is NO CHARISMA
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2002 at 8:36 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592250918598
View User Forum
Scholar
44 posts
There is no charisma bonus on this robe. If it had, it would be even more godlier than it is now for enchanters. Only the planes robe, the Velius quest robes or the benevolence robe (skyshrine quest) is better without going "uber-guild". Easily obtainable with some determination to camp the North wing named room (not a common drop for a somewhat rare spawn).

Got mine last night. :)

I think the color and look are awesome personally!

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 05 2001 at 12:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
bainwright
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2001 at 1:27 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
you are obviously not a chanter noob. this item rocks, with the superior int to most robes, the uniqueness from the other robes of comparable stats, and the fact that only a chanter can use it, i will be wearing mine until i get so bored with game i decide to do the planes until i get my planes robe there
▲ Page top
RE: bainwright
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2004 at 4:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591812956861
Scholar
70 posts
Err.... Feel the love? Right, well anyway, I'm aware I'm four years late nearly and that also means the value of this robe is probably a lot different than it once was but there is one thing that does remain constant that I feel the need to let others know who may be new.

I'd say this robe is only good until about maybe level 30 if that these days. For any class, really, if they could use it. You're better off getting something with dexterity or some such thing rather than resist gear; if an Enchanter, Wizard, Necro or whatever gets hit with a spell chances are their group was Doomed anyway. My main's a level 65 enchanter, it's just a Fact we're gonna get initial aggro on certain pulls. Having gotten a lot of caster mob aggro I can say the very most I've had cast on me from temporarily taking aggro is Wrath or maybe Root or Spectral Shackles. Nothing that would've affected the Group much anyway except maybe me requiring a quick heal once in a blue moon. Finding caster mobs is just too hard for this to be better than dex anyway.

If you solo I'm sure this is a different story as you'll be a lot more likely to be hit with spells but these days finding a chanty soloing pre-61 is nearly impossible.... =)

I hope this kinda helps at least.

Edited, Sun Aug 8 17:39:46 2004
▲ Page top
